headline: Edge leads on price, ESB holds sunset premium
body: Edge is the lowest-priced attraction today at $42 all-in for morning tour times, undercutting ESB's $48 Opening tier by $6. However, ESB maintains the strongest sunset positioning - peak Sunset/Twilight prices reach $62 vs Edge's $54 evening slots. TOR is competitive at $42-52 range. Summit sits highest at $55+ across most tour times. Weekend demand is lifting all prices 8-12% above weekday levels.
opportunities: ESB Late Afternoon at $52 is $2 below Edge's equivalent window - potential to close gap
TOR afternoon tour times showing 15% sell-through, signaling soft demand - monitor for price drops
Edge Advance Saver pulling bookings 14+ days out - ESB has no equivalent forward discount
